titles.title: Lord I Am Coming into You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v4 v7 v4 v8 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Aba Father There's a request I'd like to make The crooked parts of my life Can you come down and make them straight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how I desire to be your temple Consecrated and pure, set aside, for your use And nothing more,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How I desire to see your stature Every time I glance at the mirror Oh your perfect Image shines forth Out of my life, out of my life So I can boldly say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord I am coming into you In the stature of a perfect man I'm coming into you In your image and your likeness

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh! Oh! Father here I am I lay before your altar My all I surrender

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh perfection, how long I await translation The seven steps of the pyramid The stature of a perfect man

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Faith my foundation, Virtue my strength Knowledge my understanding, Temperance my peace Patience my rest, Godliness you in I manifest Brotherly kindness, Love and forgiveness

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Then you inside my temple Forever make your domain So I can boldly say
